assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: Step 1 explicitly shows upgrading the control plane first with gcloud container clusters upgrade --master command before any node pool upgrades

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Clearly specifies upgrade order as 'Coordinators → Data nodes → Masters (least to most critical)' with rationale that coordinators are lowest risk and masters are most critical

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: Mentions in cluster overview that 'Regional pd-ssd PVs (survive node replacement)' and includes this in key safety measures as 'Regional PVs: Data survives node replacement automatically'

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: Provides specific PodDisruptionBudget configuration with 'minAvailable: 2' for master nodes with comment 'Allows 1 master to drain, keeps quorum of 2'

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Step 2 shows configuring all node pools with '--max-surge-upgrade 1 --max-unavailable-upgrade 0' and strategy section specifies these exact values for all pool types

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Shows 'curl -X GET localhost:9200/_cluster/health?pretty' commands in monitoring sections for each upgrade step and post-upgrade validation includes waiting for green status

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: Kubernetes preparation section includes specific command 'kubectl get pv -o custom-columns=NAME:.metadata.name,RECLAIM:.spec.persistentVolumeReclaimPolicy | grep elasticsearch' to verify PV reclaim policies are Retain

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: Post-upgrade validation includes 'kubectl get statefulsets -n elasticsearch' and monitoring sections show 'kubectl get pods' commands to check StatefulSet status

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist includes specific curl command for taking snapshot: 'curl -X PUT localhost:9200/_snapshot/backup_repository/pre-upgrade-snapshot?wait_for_completion=true'
